# Neurocritical Care

Intracranial Vascular Malformations Vascular Malformation Rupture Risk and Suggested Treatment Type Yearly rupture risk Risk Factors Treatment

AVM 5% Size (>3 cm), deep venous drainage, nidal aneurysms, prior hemorrhage

Surgical, gamma knife embolization, observation depending on location, size, age Cavernous malformation 2-3% Prior hemorrhage Surgical vs observation

Venous angioma 0.1-0.5% Large size Not warranted Capillary telangiectasia Unknown (rare) -- Not warranted
